title: Pathway to Independence - an interview with Joaquín Navajas Acedo.
abstract: Joaquín Navajas Acedo is a Postdoc in the lab of Dr Alexander Schier in Biozentrum at the University of Basel, Switzerland. He is interested in how the nervous system evolves and develops at the single-cell level. Joaquín is part of the third cohort of Development's Pathway to Independence (PI) fellows, aiming to support the transition to a group leader. We met with Joaquín via Teams to talk about his research vision, zebrafish and the importance of community.
